_note: DUMMY data for use-case testing. Replace `speakers[]` with the client's speaker list. `photo` is an optional filename under /img/speakers or a full URL; when blank the UI shows the speaker's initials.

speakers.name: Dr. Amara Suryadi
speakers.title: Senior Fellow, Centre for Strategic Studies
speakers.bio: Dr. Suryadi is a foreign-policy scholar specialising in Southeast Asian regional order. She has advised several ASEAN-track dialogues and authored two books on middle-power diplomacy.

speakers.name: Amb. Faisal Rahman
speakers.title: Former Ambassador & Career Diplomat
speakers.bio: A career diplomat with over 25 years of service, Ambassador Rahman has led bilateral negotiations across three continents and now mentors young professionals entering the field.

speakers.name: Mei-Lin Tan
speakers.title: Director, Asia Youth Policy Lab
speakers.bio: Mei-Lin runs advocacy and communications workshops for emerging leaders and has trained delegations for multiple model-UN and youth assembly programmes.

speakers.name: Prof. David Okonkwo
speakers.title: Professor of International Negotiation
speakers.bio: Prof. Okonkwo designs experiential negotiation curricula used by diplomatic academies, blending game theory with real-world conflict-resolution case studies.
